llm_response:
The team will commence the week with a collaborative brainstorming session to define the feature scope. Daily stand-ups will ensure alignment on progress and immediate blockers are addressed. A comprehensive update on the project status will be provided during the weekly review.

Monday through Friday will be dedicated to intensive coding, rigorous testing, and scheduled team meetings. The schedule includes specific blocks for code review and integration testing to maintain quality standards. Developers must submit a daily status update by 5:00 PM to track their individual contributions. For further guidance on agile methodologies, please refer to [Agile Best Practices](https://www.agilemanifesto.org). The final day will focus on documentation and preparing the release package for deployment.
